name: task_get_subtree
description: Get the full subtree of a task, including all descendants at every level of nesting. Returns a hierarchical tree structure rooted at the specified task. Use this for a complete view of a task's decomposition, progress tracking across all subtasks, and dependency analysis.

task_id.description: Unique identifier of the root task whose full subtree to retrieve

examples.name: Get full subtree for a project task
Get subtree to check overall progress
